title: Iden's Decor
description: Adds a variety of furniture and decorative blocks with no specific theme
body:
![banner](https://imgur.com/hgsnhJD.png)
![banner2](https://imgur.com/gOJlq3t.png)
![banner3](https://imgur.com/yF8jM04.png)
![warning_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/265722338a46ed2db6725159ae414355a1a494c6.png)**Feedback, suggestions, and bug reports are always welcome!**![warning_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/265722338a46ed2db6725159ae414355a1a494c6.png)

![warning_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/265722338a46ed2db6725159ae414355a1a494c6.png)**[Fusion Required](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)** ![warning_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/265722338a46ed2db6725159ae414355a1a494c6.png)

Iden's Decor is a Decoration mod that adds immersive furniture and modern decorative blocks to enhance your builds, without entirely breaking Minecraft’s aesthetic.

Perfect for players who love building cities, offices, industrial areas, and modern environments in modded Minecraft.

✨ **What it Adds**:
- Modern blocks
- Custom lever and button variants
- Modern lighting blocks
- Plushies to decorate your world
- Colored wooden planks
- Industrial and utility-themed blocks
- More is constantly being added!

**🔎Why use Iden's Decor?**
> When building cities and industrial-themed environments, I often felt that most furniture mods focused only on wooden or rustic styles.
>  
> Iden's Decor was created to fill that gap, providing modern, clean, and industrial-inspired decoration blocks that fit perfectly into contemporary builds while staying true to Minecraft’s Vanilla+ style.

🥔And yes, potato is still the best food
